Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "GREATGURIANOS-0400" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Great Gurianos (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the unnecessary JSR $0FAE call at $0448 to fix an issue where the fire button would not start the game when using a Final Cartridge or the BackBit cartridge. The reason for this is that the code checks the value at $DF00 (in I/O Area #2) which is used by both cartridges. The Action Replay is not affected. Thanks to Evie Salomon for finding the issue and LastChance for reporting it.
